content.title: 🚀 Muslims Day v6.1.0 is here!
content.subtitle: Added few exciting features
content.body:
Alhamdulillah! The latest update brings several new features and improvements to make your experience even better:

✅ View all 5 daily prayer times at once
✅ Track your Fard prayers directly from the Home Screen
✅ Quran with Tajweed Color Coding
✅ New Premium Features: Umrah Tracker, Auto Silent Mode & Home Screen Widgets
✅ Faster access to Quran, Tafsir, Qibla Compass and other key features
✅ Various UI improvements and bug fixes

🎁 Special Bonus: Update the app and enjoy 3 days of Ad-Free experience!

Thank you for being part of the Muslims Day community. Update now and explore the latest improvements designed to help you stay connected with your Deen every day, InshaAllah.

May Allah accept our efforts and make this a means of benefit for millions. Ameen.

footer_button.hint: Please update if you haven't already.
